extraction.one_line_summary: MASS Enric soloed to victory after attacking on the final climb, holding off LANDA Mikel by 12 seconds while ROGLIC Primož secured overall victory
tactical_patterns: Quick-Step isolated MASS on final climb then he accelerated when road leveled, not on steepest gradient.
LANDA chased using slipstream of BOOKMANN rather than riding solo, suggesting desperation or calculated energy conservation.
ROGLIC accepted stage loss when MØHLBERGER paced him, prioritizing GC defense over stage hunting with secure lead.

rider_signals.MASS Enric: positive: Third Quick-Step win reveals team's exceptional form block, individual had energy to accelerate after climb
rider_signals.LANDA Mikel: negative: Lost by 12 seconds despite chasing every meter, suggesting inferior climbing power on final ascent
rider_signals.ROGLIC Primož: neutral: Required MØHLBERGER assistance on run-in despite comfortable GC margin, revealing conservative approach or fatigue
rider_signals.QUINTANA Nairo: negative: Finished fifth on punchy summit finish, indicating declining explosiveness on terrain once suited to him
